arts.ttl: Ornstein names two potential Chelsea transfer targets, including Man United star
arts.sum: David Ornstein has reported on two potential Chelsea transfer targets to watch out for this summer as the Blues look for a top class winger signing. Answering fans’ questions for the Athletic, Ornstein said that Chelsea have been linked with both Manchester United’s Alejandro Garnacho and Borussia Dortmund’s Jamie Gittens.
